heading: View Projects
body:
To list all projects using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas projects list [options]

```To return the details for the project you specify using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas projects describe <ID> [options]

```To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas projects list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-projects-list) and
[atlas projects describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-projects-describe).Related Links* [Install the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/install-atlas-cli)

* [Connect to the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/connect-atlas-cli)
